name: Strawberry-Pineapple Marmalade
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 cups Pineapple, finely chopped and cored
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the pineapple, orange peel, orange pulp, and sugar in a large saucepan.
2. Stir occasionally until the sugar dissolves.
3. Bring to a boil slowly.
4. Cook rapidly for 15 minutes.
5. Add the strawberries and continue cooking rapidly until thick, about 20 to 30 minutes. Stir frequently to prevent sticking.
6. Pour hot into hot jars, leaving 1/4 inch head space (6mm).
7. Adjust lids and process in boiling water bath for 10 minutes.
Yield: About 6 half pints (1440 mL).
